name: io.github.justadityaraj/amazon-in-mcp-server
title: Amazon.in MCP Server
description: Search Amazon.in: cheapest in-stock, best-value picks, product details, Keepa price-history.

environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_IN_AFFILIATE_TAG
environmentVariables.description: Override the default Amazon Associates tag baked into emitted amazon.in URLs. Set to an empty string to disable affiliate tagging entirely.

environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_IN_PROXY
environmentVariables.description: Optional HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL (e.g. http://user:pass@host:8080) to route all amazon.in requests through. Helps when a datacenter or CI IP is bot-blocked. Unset means a direct connection.

environmentVariables.name: AMAZON_IN_CACHE_TTL_MS
environmentVariables.description: Lifetime in milliseconds for the in-memory page cache that de-duplicates repeated lookups. Defaults to 90000 (90s); set to 0 to disable caching.
